name: Cocoa Cookie Hearts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together butter, sugar, and eggs on medium speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
2. Stir together flour, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; add to the butter mixture, beating until well blended. Cover and refrigerate dough for about 1 hour or until firm enough to handle.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. On a lightly floured surface, roll the dough to an 1/8-inch thickness. Cut into heart-shaped cookies using a cookie cutter. Place on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake for 5 to 7 minutes or until no imprint remains when touched lightly in the center. Allow to cool for 1 minute before removing from the baking sheet and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
6. Frost with Valentine Frosting; decorate as desired. Makes about 4 dozen cookies.
Valentine Frosting:
In a bowl, beat powdered sugar, shortening, milk, vanilla extract, and food color (if desired) until smooth and of spreading consistency. About 3/4 cup frosting is needed.
Variation: Chocolate Valentine Frosting - Stir 3 tablespoons Hershey's Cocoa into the powdered sugar. Omit food color. Proceed as directed above, increasing milk to 3 tablespoons.
